reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.goodhousekeeping.com/beauty-products/g70505833/best-led-face-masks-2026/ and extract every red light therapy mask and LED device they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, wavelengths, treatment time, FDA status, pros with specific test results, cons.

Go to https://www.elle.com/beauty/makeup-skin-care/g65542374/best-red-light-therapy-masks/ and extract every red light therapy mask they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, wavelengths, treatment time, key features, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.cnet.com/health/personal-care/best-red-light-therapy-devices/ and extract every red light therapy device they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, FDA clearance status, wavelengths, treatment time, pros with specific test results, cons.

Go to https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbes-personal-shopper/article/best-led-face-mask/ and extract every LED face mask and red light therapy device they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, wavelengths, treatment time, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.wareable.com/health-tech/best-red-light-therapy-mask and extract every red light therapy mask and device they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their rating and award, price, wavelengths, treatment area, treatment time, pros with specific test results, cons.
